MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elisa Stewart, Esq. 415-274-0700 of Stewart & Musell LLP for Plaintiff.
Fiel Tigno, Supervising Deputy Attorney General, 510-879-1003, Lauren Powe, Deputy Attorney General, 510-879-1246 for Defendant Judicial Council of California.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces the tentative ruling. Defendant Argues public policy, CCP 425.16(e)4, public interest, first amendment, cites case law. Plaintiff responds and agrees with the tentative ruling. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
